query:
-- Check what billing items are matched to a sample Managed Voice Support service
SELECT 
  bi.id,
  bi.description,
  bi.lineAmount,
  bi.amountExGst,
  bi.matchStatus,
  bi.matchedServiceExternalId,
  bi.serviceRefId,
  bi.customerName,
  bi.invoiceDate
FROM billing_items bi
WHERE bi.matchedServiceExternalId IN ('S1242','S1260','S1235','S1323','S1081')
   OR bi.serviceRefId IN ('S1242','S1260','S1235','S1323','S1081')
ORDER BY bi.matchedServiceExternalId, bi.invoiceDate DESC
LIMIT 20;
